title: CMB-S4 Verdict Routing Drill (v11.7 Extension)
description: Synthetic sigma-scenario routing drill for CMB-S4 predictions, modeled after Pillar 281 DESI DR3 routing drill. Tests idempotence and provenance receipt logic for all three UM CMB predictions (ns, r, peak suppression) at CMB-S4 precision.

cmbs4_projected_precision.notes: CMB-S4 Science Book (2016) projections; actual may differ

drill_scenarios.action: Log to OBSERVATION_TRACKER; P1 DERIVED confirmed
Flag in CLAIM_MASTER_BOARD; review braided winding mechanism

drill_scenarios.description: CMB-S4 measures ns=0.955 ± 0.002 → UM at 4.25σ outside range
drill_scenarios.action: P1 falsified; update FALLIBILITY.md; trigger CLAIM_MASTER_BOARD P1 revision

drill_scenarios.description: CMB-S4 measures r < 0.003 (95% CL) → UM r=0.0315 would be falsified
drill_scenarios.action: If CMB-S4 measures r<0.010 at >=3sigma: P2 FALSIFIED; update FALLIBILITY.md
drill_scenarios.note: Current ACT DR6 tension (r=0.0315 > 0.016 at 95%CL) precedes this scenario

drill_scenarios.action: P2 DERIVED confirmed; log to OBSERVATION_TRACKER

drill_scenarios.description: CMB-S4 confirms peak suppression x4-7 vs LCDM (consistent with FALLIBILITY Admission 2)
drill_scenarios.action: Confirm FALLIBILITY Admission 2 remains documented; no claim label change

idempotence_check.re_run_verdict: Identical inputs produce identical verdicts across all 6 scenarios
